questions.text: What are the different types of transmission technology widely used in computer networks? Explain.
What is the transmission time of a packet sent by a station if the length of the packet is I million bytes and the bandwidth of the channel is 200 Kbps?
A bit string,0ll110l11110llllll0, needs to be transmitted at the data link layer. If the flag used is 011I I 110, what is the string actually transmitted after bit stuffing?
What is Binary exponential backoffalgorithm? Explain its working.
State Optimalityprinciple. What is a Sink tree?
Explain the Count-to-Infinity problem in distance vector routing.
A network on the Internet has a subnet mask of 255.255.240.0. What maximum number of hosts it can handle?
What is the function of RARP?
What is UDP? Draw and explain UDP header format.
What are the basic functions supported by an e-mail?
Draw ISO OSI reference model and explain the functionalities of each layer in the model.
List and explain the service primitives required to implement a connection-oriented service.
List the different guided media for communication. Explain the cable type, connectors, and applications of each of them.
Differentiate between ,irirpl*, half duplex and full duplex mode of communication with diagrams. Give one example for each.
Explain the concept of Sliding window protocols. Differentiate between the working of One-bit sliding window, Selective repeat and Go-back- N bidirectional protocols.
A bit stream l00lt10l is transmiffed using the standard CRC method. The generator polynomial i, 3 + l. Show the actual bit string transmitted.
Which are the devices operating in datalink layer and physical layer? Explain the function of each of them.
Draw and explain IEEE 802.1I Wireless LAN frame structure.
Consider the following subnet.

Distance vector routing is used, and the following vectors have just come in to router C: from B: (5, 0, 8, 12, 6,2); from D: (16, 12, 6, 0, 9, l0); and from E: (7,6,3,9,0,4). The measured delays to B, D, and E, are 6,3, and 5, respectively. What is C's new routing table? Give both the outgoing line to use and the expected delay.
Illustrate the packet routing process of mobile host
